name: Sakura Chroma
description: Vintage-Japanese product catalogue — a warm cream-paper field, brown ink, and a saturated catalogue red, with tall condensed Big Shoulders Display headlines + numerals and a humanist Albert Sans body. Ribbon bands, a petal cluster, a rosette seal.
descriptionZh: 复古日式产品目录——暖奶油纸底、棕墨、饱和目录红，高瘦压缩 Big Shoulders 标题与数字 + 人文 Albert Sans 正文。缎带、花瓣簇、玫瑰印章。
bestFor: Product / craft / culture / catalogue topics — a warm expressive vintage-Japanese workshop register.
